ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject */,
  "weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of weight (e.g., kg, lb) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the subject */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the subject */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "measurement_system" TEXT /* Measurement system used (e.g., metric, imperial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hand_spans" (
  "hand_span_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand span measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "span1" REAL /* Span 1 measurement */,
  "span2" REAL /* Span 2 measurement */,
  "left_hand_span" REAL /* Span of the left hand */,
  "right_hand_span" REAL /* Span of the right hand */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the hand span measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the hand span measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_span_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hand_spans_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pulse_rates" (
  "pulse_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pulse rate measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "pulse_rate" INTEGER /* Pulse rate measurement */,
  "resting_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Resting heart rate */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level during measurement (e.g., resting, light activity, moderate activity) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the pulse rate measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the pulse rate measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pulse_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pulse_rates_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folding_habits" (
  "folding_habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folding habit measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "fold" TEXT /* Folding habit (e.g., right, left, neither) */,
  "fold_type" TEXT /* Type of fold (e.g., right, left, neither, mixed) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the folding habit measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the folding habit measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folding_habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folding_habits_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_routines" (
  "exercise_routine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise routine measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "exercise" TEXT /* Exercise routine (e.g., some, none) */,
  "exercise_type" TEXT /* Type of exercise (e.g., running, cycling, swimming) */,
  "exercise_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exercise in minutes */,
  "exercise_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the exercise (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the exercise routine measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the exercise routine measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_routines_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_habits" (
  "smoking_habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking habit measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "smokes" TEXT /* Smoking habit (e.g., never, regul) */,
  "cigarettes_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of cigarettes smoked per day */,
  "smoking_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of smoking history in years */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the smoking habit measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the smoking habit measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_habits_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hand_preferences" (
  "hand_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand preference measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Hand preference (e.g., right, left) */,
  "preference_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the hand preference (e.g., strong, moderate, weak) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the hand preference measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the hand preference measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hand_preferences_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clap_preferences" (
  "clap_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clap preference measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "clap" TEXT /* Clap preference (e.g., left, neither) */,
  "preference_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the clap preference (e.g., strong, moderate, weak) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the clap preference measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the clap preference measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clap_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clap_preferences_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "height_group" TEXT /* Height group (e.g., 160-170, 171-180) */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., high school, college, graduate) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the demographic measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the demographic measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biometric_data" (
  "biometric_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biometric data measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "hand_span_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hand span measurement */,
  "pulse_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pulse rate measurement */,
  "folding_habit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folding habit measurement */,
  "exercise_routine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise routine measurement */,
  "smoking_habit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smoking habit measurement */,
  "hand_preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hand preference measurement */,
  "clap_preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clap preference measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the biometric data collection */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the biometric data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the biometric data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biometric_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_hand_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_preference_id") REFERENCES hand_preferences ("hand_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_pulse_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("pulse_rate_id") REFERENCES pulse_rates ("pulse_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_exercise_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_routine_id") REFERENCES exercise_routines ("exercise_routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_clap_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("clap_preference_id") REFERENCES clap_preferences ("clap_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_smoking_habit_id FOREIGN KEY ("smoking_habit_id") REFERENCES smoking_habits ("smoking_habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_folding_habit_id FOREIGN KEY ("folding_habit_id") REFERENCES folding_habits ("folding_habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_hand_span_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_span_id") REFERENCES hand_spans ("hand_span_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher (e.g., physiology, biometrics) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the researcher (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "biometric_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biometric data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the researcher's device */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data accessed (e.g., subject ID, measurement type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_biometric_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("biometric_data_id") REFERENCES biometric_data ("biometric_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., hand span, pulse rate) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, bpm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "biometric_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biometric data being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time of the analysis */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis (e.g., Pearson correlation, linear regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_biometric_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("biometric_data_id") REFERENCES biometric_data ("biometric_data_id")
)
